mapper.sql: id, name, code, class_code, description, subject, topics, creator_id, creator_role, student_ids, knowledge_base_ids, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course ( id, name, code, class_code, description, subject, topics, creator_id, creator_role, student_ids, knowledge_base_ids, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{classCode}, #{description}, #{subject}, #{topics, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorRole}, #{studentIds, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{knowledgeBaseIds, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, class_code = #{classCode}, description = #{description}, subject = #{subject}, topics = #{topics, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, creator_role = #{creatorRole}, student_ids = #{studentIds, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, knowledge_base_ids = #{knowledgeBaseIds, typeHandler=cn.yifan.drawsee.typehandler.JsonTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM course WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM course WHERE class_code = #{classCode} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM course WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET student_ids = JSON_ARRAY_APPEND( CASE WHEN student_ids IS NULL THEN JSON_ARRAY() ELSE student_ids END, '$', #{studentId} ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{courseId} AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(student_ids, CAST(#{studentId} AS JSON))

UPDATE course SET student_ids = JSON_REMOVE( student_ids, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_SEARCH(student_ids, 'one', #{studentId})) ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{courseId} AND JSON_CONTAINS(student_ids, CAST(#{studentId} AS JSON))

UPDATE course SET knowledge_base_ids = JSON_ARRAY_APPEND( CASE WHEN knowledge_base_ids IS NULL THEN JSON_ARRAY() ELSE knowledge_base_ids END, '$', #{knowledgeBaseId} ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{courseId} AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(knowledge_base_ids, JSON_QUOTE(#{knowledgeBaseId}))

UPDATE course SET knowledge_base_ids = JSON_REMOVE( knowledge_base_ids, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_SEARCH(knowledge_base_ids, 'one', #{knowledgeBaseId})) ), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{courseId} AND JSON_CONTAINS(knowledge_base_ids, JSON_QUOTE(#{knowledgeBaseId}))
